quotes: Study Objective: Evaluate efficacy and safety of XR-7491 in moderate-to-severe rheumatoid arthritis.
Primary Endpoint: ACR20 response rate at Week 12.
details: Study sites: 12 clinical centers across North America.
Inclusion criteria: ACR criteria met, RA duration >6 months.
Exclusion criteria: Active hepatitis B/C, ALT >1.5x ULN.
Baseline visit scheduled for all randomized subjects.
Baseline lab results within normal limits.
No adverse events reported at screening.
Normal range definitions applied per protocol.
No flagged results in baseline panel.

quotes: DSMB Review 1 notes no safety signals.

details: Site staff training up to date.
